Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key stakeholders and their perspectives 1 Mary Accounts Payable Clerk Initial invoice reception PO validation logging forwarding to purchasing 2 Dan Purchasing Officer PO verification receipt confirmation communicating back to AP 3 Carlos Department Manager Final approval review of discrepancies 4 Rita Accounts Payable Supervisor Exception handling escalation point 5 Karen Supplier Relationship Manager Indirect role in resolving discrepancies with suppliers

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Main process flow based on interviews 1 Invoice received by email 2 Check for PO number No PO Request details from supplier Has PO Log into accounting system 3 Forward to purchasing for receipt confirmation 4 Compare invoice to PO Match Send to manager for approval Discrepancy Email purchasing for clarification If unresolved Escalate to supervisor 5 Manager approval If issues Reject or investigate 6 Schedule for payment
